name: AutomationRule
description: Configuration for automated card sending based on triggers

triggerTypeId.description: Reference to the TriggerType that activates this rule

templateId.description: Reference to the Template used for cards sent by this rule

daysBefore.description: Number of days before the trigger date to send the card

daysAfter.description: Number of days after the trigger date to send the card

frequencyCap.description: How often to send cards for this trigger per client

isActive.description: Whether this automation rule is currently active

customMessage.description: Optional custom message to append to the template

last_run_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time this rule was executed

next_run_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the next scheduled execution

description.description: Human-readable description of this automation rule

client_filter.description: Optional filter to limit which clients this rule applies to (e.g., by tag or custom field)
